changeSet.author: thanh
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE sugar_advisor.family_members ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), user_id UUID NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, age INT, relation VARCHAR(50), daily_sugar_limit DECIMAL(6,2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
CONSTRAINT fk_family_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES sugar_advisor.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );
